# mgc_container_registry_member (Data Source)

Retrieves a single member of a Container Registry.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `member_id` (String) ID of the membership entry
- `registry_id` (String) ID of the registry

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the membership was created
- `role` (String) Role assigned to the member
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp when the membership was last updated
- `user_id` (String) ID of the user
